header_title.description: App din a ɛda header no so. Adidibea a wɔhwehwɛ aduan a ɛfiri wiase nyinaa.

header_subtitle.text: Hwehwɛ aduan fi wiase nyinaa mu
header_subtitle.description: Tagline a ɛda app din ase wɔ header no mu.

home_page_hero_title.description: Titire kɛse a ɛda home page hero beae no so.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Hwɛ nokware aduan a ɛfiri wiase mmaadwo mu
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle a ɛda hero titire ase wɔ home page no so.

home_page_featured_title.description: Beae titire a ɛda aduan kɔd no so wɔ grid no anim.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Bere a wɔfa so yɛ aduan no wɔ aduan kɔd no so. {minutes} de bɛkyerɛ bere no a ɛda mu.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label a ɛda aduan ho den a ɛwɔ aduan kɔd no so anim.

recipe_card_easy.description: Den a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduan no yɛ mmerɛ.

recipe_card_medium.description: Den a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduan no yɛ mfinimfini den.

recipe_card_hard.description: Den a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduan no yɛ dɛn paa.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Nnuaba a wɔde pork bone broth a ɛdɔɔso yɛ, chashu a ɛyɛ mmerɛ, kosua a wɔbɔ wɔn mu hyɛ no, ne nnuaba foforo.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Neapolitan pizza a ɛyɛ dɛ a wɔde San Marzano nkyene, mozzarella foforo, ne basil.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Pork a wɔde ankaa, cilantro, ne ankaa nkyene wɔ corn tortillas so.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Akokɔ a ɛyɛ mmerɛ wɔ tomato ne nkuto a ɛyɛ creamy mu a wɔde nsɛm a ɛyɛ fɛfɛɛfɛ ka ho.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Rice noodles a wɔde shrimp, tofu, nkateɛ, ne tamarind sauce bɔ mu.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes a ɛyɛ fine na ɛyɛ fɛfɛɛfɛ a wɔde Nutella, strawberries foforo, ne whipped cream hyɛ mu.
